name: brief-ai-enhancement
goal: Make the brief command produce concise AI-synthesized briefings with graceful fallback and --raw flag

userStories.title: Add brief AITask type and default tier mapping
userStories.description: Extend the AITask union type to include 'brief' and add default tier mapping (brief → standard) in DEFAULT_TASK_TIERS.
acceptanceCriteria: AITask type includes 'brief'
DEFAULT_TASK_TIERS maps brief to 'standard'
npm run typecheck passes
npm test passes (existing AI tests unaffected)

userStories.title: Create synthesizeBriefing() in IntelligenceService
userStories.description: Add synthesizeBriefing() method that takes assembled briefing + topic, sends to AIService for synthesis with context truncation, returns structured result with graceful fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: synthesizeBriefing(briefing, topic, aiService) method exists on IntelligenceService
Truncates assembled markdown to 12000 characters before sending to AI
Uses 'brief' AITask for model routing
Returns SynthesizedBriefing with synthesis text, truncated flag, and usage stats
Gracefully returns null when AI call fails
Prompt produces 5-section briefing: Status, Key Decisions, Key People, Recent Activity, Open Questions/Risks
Unit tests cover successful synthesis, truncation, and AI failure

userStories.title: Add --raw flag and AI synthesis to CLI brief command
userStories.description: Modify registerBriefCommand() to pipe assembled briefing through AI synthesis by default, with --raw flag to skip. Handle all combinations: AI configured, not configured, raw flag, JSON mode.
acceptanceCriteria: --raw flag added to brief command
AI configured + no raw: displays AI synthesis
AI not configured: shows raw output + info message about configuring AI
--raw flag: shows raw output regardless of AI
--json includes synthesized, synthesis, and raw fields
AI failure: falls back to raw with warning
Unit tests cover AI path, raw path, no-AI fallback, JSON mode

userStories.title: Integration testing and quality polish
userStories.description: End-to-end testing of all paths, verify JSON mode completeness, backward compatibility, and quality gates.
acceptanceCriteria: All existing brief tests still pass
Empty briefing handled gracefully in both AI and raw modes
--json output complete and parseable for all paths
npm run typecheck passes
npm test passes (full suite)
